raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white robotic arm is positioned above a brown drawer. The drawer has a front panel with a handle. The drawer is currently closed. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the drawer handle to pull it open. The handle is the only interactive part for opening. Failure modes include misgrasping the handle or pulling with insufficient force. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer body to position the arm; Step 2 grasp the handle for a secure grip; Step 3 pull the handle to open the drawer.**
Goal: open(drawer)
Scene: drawer, robotic_arm
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the front panel of the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(handle_of_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle on the front panel of the drawer
  contact: holding(handle_of_drawer) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(handle_of_drawer)
Step 3: pull(handle_of_drawer -> open)
  affordance_region: the handle on the front panel of the drawer
  contact: holding(handle_of_drawer) [progress]
  spatial: distance(handle_of_drawer, drawer_edge, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(handle_of_drawer, drawer_edge) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front panel of the drawer
the handle on the front panel of the drawer
the handle on the front panel of the drawer
